steps.name: Project Brief
steps.description: Define the project brief, goals, and comparable products.

steps.name: Research
steps.description: Research competitors, domain knowledge, and user personas.

steps.name: Brand
steps.description: Define visual identity, colors, fonts, and design tokens.

steps.name: User Journeys
steps.description: Map user journeys with personas, steps, and EARS acceptance criteria.

steps.name: Features
steps.description: Derive and plan features from user journeys, organized in numbered groups.

steps.name: Screens
steps.description: Specify screens with component inventories for each feature group.

steps.name: Storybook
steps.description: Orchestrator: delegates to 4 sub-skills (setup, components, pages, journeys).

sub_skills.description: Scaffold project, install deps, apply brand tokens

steps.name: Architecture
steps.description: Document system architecture: apps, NestJS modules, data flow, protocols, and infrastructure beyond PostXL defaults.

steps.name: Data Model
steps.description: Design the PostXL-native data model with entities and relationships.

steps.name: Storybook Types
steps.description: Replace mocked Storybook types with schema-generated types via pxl types.

post_pipeline.name: Mockups
post_pipeline.description: Generate high-fidelity UI mockups from screen specs.

post_pipeline.name: Bootstrap
post_pipeline.description: Scaffold a production-ready PostXL project from the concept.

implementation_pipeline.name: Scaffold
implementation_pipeline.description: Create PostXL project, copy schema, run initial generators, init git.

implementation_pipeline.name: Startup Verification
implementation_pipeline.description: Start app stack, verify accessible via browser. Manual verification, no skill.

implementation_pipeline.name: Foundation
implementation_pipeline.description: Apply brand tokens, configure auth, implement app shell.

implementation_pipeline.name: Infrastructure
implementation_pipeline.condition: 3_blueprint/2_architecture/architecture.md exists with custom_modules or additional apps
implementation_pipeline.description: Set up custom backend modules, provider abstractions, communication infrastructure, and additional processes from the architecture doc.

implementation_pipeline.name: Features
implementation_pipeline.description: Implement features with TDD (sequential, per feature group). implement-generate may run between groups.

implementation_pipeline.name: Final Re-generation
implementation_pipeline.description: Final PostXL generation pass to sync any schema changes made during features.

implementation_pipeline.name: User Acceptance Testing
implementation_pipeline.description: Guided walkthrough of key user journeys. Business user tests against original requirements.

implementation_orchestrator.name: Full Implementation
implementation_orchestrator.description: Orchestrate full app implementation from completed concept.

incremental.name: Add/Modify Feature
incremental.description: Add a new feature or modify an existing one in a live concept. Cascades changes through downstream artifacts (architecture, data model, screens) and optionally implements if the app is already built.

feedback_loops.description: User journeys populate candidate features for the features skill.
Screen specs register back into feature frontmatter.
Data model entities link back to features.
